public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as magical knowledge overseer.
appearance: Controlled ward-signs, sanctioned tools, and careful handling of magical materials make procedure part of their public bearing.
manner: Frames magic as something to regulate, channel, or survive rather than admire casually. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a magical knowledge overseer still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of magical knowledge overseer in and around Ashforge Quarry, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ashforge Quarry workable through the obligations of magical knowledge overseer while managing the immediate pressure of predators in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must hold procedure, hazard awareness, and institutional oversight together around forces that do not forgive carelessness. Around Ashforge Quarry, that usually means carrying predators, avalanches, geothermal bursts without letting the role of magical knowledge overseer visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Gorath Myrn may grant controlled access to magical insight if the party can solve a containment or trust problem first.
Gorath Myrn needs help containing magical fallout, unauthorized practice, or unstable relic behavior near Ashforge Quarry.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Containment tools, ward-aware procedure, and careful handling of sanctioned magic mark Gorath Myrn as an authorized arcane presence. In Ashforge Quarry, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Hill Giant foremen, industrial clans.

who_avoids_them: those who mistake sanction for freedom

In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a magical knowledge overseer still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Magical knowledge overseer, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Soreheim Alliance.
what_they_refuse: Gorath Myrn refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.

how_they_can_help: Gorath Myrn can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
